trait.name: Endless Battlement
trait.effect: Once a round, you may dash 3 at the start or end of any allied turn. You are unstoppable and immune to all damage while moving this way. Overdrive a round.

basicAttack.name: Furor
basicAttack.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. Hit: +1d6.
On hit 2 vigor. If you or your target is in crisis, deals damage [+] and double vigor gain.

limitBreak.name: Perfect Parry
limitBreak.effect:
Even the strongest of blows glances off a bastion in their full glory.
Trigger or an adjacent ally takes damage from a foe's ability.
Effect [X]: Roll 1d6. Reduce the damage by half. If you roll equal to or under the round number, the damage additionally cannot reduce its target below 1 hp. The triggering foe then gains 1d3 dazed and is pushed 1d3 spaces. If you roll exactly the round number, deal half the amount of damage as the triggering ability to your foe.
Overdrive you roll exactly the round number, deal the full damage.

keywords.name: Overdrive
keywords.description: Triggers automatically at round 3 or later.
